violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

(Corn beef hash) was observed held at (103 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 or above Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Knives was observed being stored btw the prep unit and hot hold station. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service call was made during the inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
Several refrigeration units located in the kitchen and basement area was not in good repair. Door handles were damage and wrapped in tape and/or missing handle. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
